notes_for_orchestrator: Prompt added with all required placeholders ({sender}, {subject}, {date}, {snippet}, {context}). Verified import and formatting work correctly. The prompt includes: (1) semantic person/contact matching with examples, (2) deal matching by company, (3) email discovery for enriching contacts without stored emails, (4) 4-level signal strength classification, (5) intel extraction with stage signals and next actions. Added match_reasoning field for debugging false negatives. The JSON response schema is strict with conditional null handling (intel=null when signal_strength=none).
